description: Functions and classes for working with structural element links.

functions.name: count
functions.description: Get the number of structural element link.

functions.name: find
functions.signature: itasca.structure.link.find(id: int) -> Structural element link object
functions.description: Get the structural element link object with the given ID number.

functions.name: list
functions.signature: itasca.structure.link.list() -> Structural element link iterator object
functions.description: Get the structural element link iterator object.

functions.name: maxid
functions.description: Get the maximum structural element link ID.
